expressions.label: Wide-eyed curious
expressions.notes: Default. Mote has never seen anything before, ever.

expressions.label: Giggle
expressions.notes: Bubbling laugh. Can be triggered by almost anything.

expressions.label: Pout
expressions.notes: Something unfair happened. Lower lip deployed.

expressions.label: Shy smile
expressions.notes: Half-hiding behind the hand that isn't there.

expressions.label: Yawn
expressions.notes: Short attention → frequent yawns → early sleep.

expressions.label: Heart eyes
expressions.notes: Loves a particular toy, character, or visitor. Ferociously.

notes: Mote — the Child specialty. Saturated sun-yellow/pink palette, high blink, max curiosity + surprise, 30s sleep threshold (short attention by design). Best fit for children's apps, playful greeting agents, low-stakes toys. Suggested Eleven voice style: high pitch, fast, a little lisp-y; think the voice of a confident 6-year-old narrating their day.
